examples.good: Adjustable Phone Stand for Desk, Foldable Aluminum Holder
examples.bad: Best Phone Stand Ever - Amazing Quality Premium Holder for All Phones ★★★
examples.note: 好：75字符内保留核心品类、属性和场景。兼容性、材质细节放 Item Highlight。差：极限词 + 装饰符号 + 无具体信息

examples.good: Clear Stackable Pantry Bins 4 Pack for Kitchen Cabinet
examples.bad: Premium Multifunctional Stackable Storage Bins for Various Uses in Home
examples.note: 好：短标题保留品类、数量、材质和核心场景。差：堆形容词、场景模糊

examples.good: Bluetooth Earbuds Noise Cancelling, 40H Playtime for Running
examples.bad: AMAZING Earbuds!! Best Sound Quality #1 Seller Cheap Price Free Shipping
examples.note: 好：75字符内保留核心词、关键功能和核心场景。差：促销词+极限词+违规
